word: G4247 - πρεσβῦτις - presbŷtis - pres-boo'-tis - Aged woman

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πρεσβύτις

- Transliteration: Presbutis

- Phonetic: pres-boo'-tis

- Definition:

1. an aged woman

- Origin: from G4246

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Feminine of G4246; an old woman: - aged woman.
